title: Propane
description: A simple, light-weight optimization mod for Minecraft Java.
body:
![This is Minecraft's FPS with Propane disabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e3a486b97f1b2951a57f2376364094615fcc99a.png)![This is Minecraft's FPS with Propane enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e088754ae301eb2d3fa74615d09b169813c389a4.png)

🧪 What is Propane?  
Propane is a performance-focused Minecraft optimization mod built to minimize CPU and memory overhead without altering visuals or breaking vanilla mechanics.

It's goal is to serve as a drop-in solution to improve frame stability, reduce latency in heavily changed environments, and help low-end systems run Minecraft smoother.

Unlike more aggressive mods that cut corners, Propane prioritizes accuracy and compatibility, ensuring a seamless gameplay experience.

🚀 Key Features  
\- Occlusion Culling Enhancements  
Only processes what's visible — reduces CPU usage in large builds and underground bases.

\- Lazy Tick System for Tile Entities  
Dynamically delays updates for non-critical blocks (like hoppers, furnaces, etc.) without affecting behavior.

\- Multithreaded Pathfinding  
Offloads mob pathfinding to background threads for smoother mob AI in large worlds.

\- Memory Leak Patches  
Prevents common sources of memory bloat in vanilla and modificated environments.

\- Minimal Visual Impact  
Keeps Minecraft looking almost the same. Removed particles, clouds and lower chunk rendering in extreme cases.

🔄 Compatibility  
Propane is built with Forge (Fabric version planned) and is built to be compatible alongside other server-side mods and some client-side mods.

🎯 Use Cases  
\- Heavily modded packs

\- Survival servers suffering from TPS drops

\- Low-end PCs that struggle with chunk ticking or entity lag

\- Players who want better performance without visual compromise

💬 Why the name?  
Because Propane is a fuel, and it boosts your game! (and because naming performance mods chemicals is very popular)
